notes: Standard safe PDF creates durable storage, DocumentReference, and governed preview.
Derivative preview is unavailable, but the file is kept and remains governed by placeholder-only artifact law.
Transport failure remains local and retryable; it is not a scanner verdict.
Malware verdict stays visible and prevents the evidence from silently disappearing.
Checksum or integrity mismatch is fail-closed and not treated like an ordinary network error.
Unsupported extensions or MIME mismatches stay explicit and bounded.
Unreadable evidence preserves visible continuity and routes to fail-closed review rather than silent metadata downgrade.
Max-size policy is explicit and cannot collapse into accepted preview posture.
Same checksum, size, and MIME under the same draft lineage replays to the existing card and no duplicate evidence row is created.
